prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类最低位次依次约9793→10131→9457→11525→13753名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近两年累计后移约4296名；2025年基准位次约13753名，为近五年最高（数字最大），反映竞争持续加剧；该校在江西省物理类招生计划2021年164人、2022年174人、2023年182人、2024年180人、2025年183人，2026年计划196人，较2025年扩招13人（增幅约7.1%），扩招幅度较为明显，对位次有后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河海大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第63名，近年稳定在60-65名区间，学校层次与综合实力保持稳定；该校在抖音学校热度总排名中位列第52名，评价为"较热"；声誉数据中无明显负面事件记录，未见投档断档或重大舆情信号，报考心理环境平稳；水利工程A+（全国顶尖）、土木工程A、环境科学与工程A，水利特色鲜明，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，河海大学在上述领域均有招生；江西省2026年高考总人数约474900人，较2025年（约472480人）小幅增加约2420人，按历史比例估算物理类考生约267844人，较2025年增加约1419人，竞争略有加剧；2026年；河海大学位于江苏南京，属长三角核心城市，对江西考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在江西省招生规模较大（物理类约196人），为外省重点生源省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次13753名、2026年扩招约7.1%带来的位次后移压力、江西省考生总数小幅增加以及学校声誉平稳、工科专业热度持续等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次在2025年基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约14359名，区间13859-14859名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 9793 → 10131 → 9457 → 11525 → 13753, showing a fluctuating and then declining trend, with a cumulative decline of about 4296 positions in the last two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 13753, the highest (largest number) in the past five years, reflecting intensifying competition; the enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Jiangxi Province was 164 in 2021, 174 in 2022, 182 in 2023, 180 in 2024, 183 in 2025, and 196 in 2026, an increase of 13 students (about 7.1%) compared to 2025, a relatively significant expansion that puts downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 63rd, stable in the 60-65 range in recent years, with a stable university level and comprehensive strength; in the overall popularity ranking on Douyin (TikTok), it ranks 52nd, rated as 'relatively popular'; there are no records of negative events in reputation data, no signs of admission gaps or major public opinion signals, and a stable psychological environment for applications; Hydraulic Engineering is A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering is A, Environmental Science and Engineering is A, with distinctive water conservancy characteristics, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, and Hohai University offers admissions in these fields; the total number of Gaokao examinees in Jiangxi Province in 2026 is about 474,900, a slight increase of about 2,420 compared to 2025 (about 472,480), with an estimated 267,844 Physics Category examinees based on historical proportions, an increase of about 1,419 from 2025, slightly intensifying competition; in 2026; Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, which has a strong regional appeal to Jiangxi examinees; the university has a large enrollment scale in Jiangxi Province (about 196 in the Physics Category), making it one of the key provinces for out-of-province students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 13,753 in 2025, the downward pressure from an enrollment expansion of about 7.1% in 2026, a slight increase in the total number of examinees in Jiangxi Province, stable university reputation, and sustained popularity of engineering majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will continue to decline from 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 14,359, with a range of 13,859 to 14,859.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 13,859 to 14,859, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 13,859), prioritize Tier 1 majors such as the Dayu Intensive Class and popular Electrical/Computer majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., around 14,859), mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety and aim for Tier 2 moderate majors. Hohai University's Hydraulic Engineering, rated A+, is top in the country, and related majors have stable employment channels, making them worth special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1709→2191→1950→2734→2619, showing a fluctuating and declining trend, peaking at 2734 in 2024 and slightly recovering to 2619 in 2025; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2619; the enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangxi Province was 24 in 2021, 26 in 2022, 26 in 2023, 27 in 2024, 25 in 2025, and 21 in 2026, a reduction of 4 students (approximately 16%) compared to 2025, which is a significant reduction and has a forward-shifting effect on rankings (weakening competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking is 63rd in 2026, stable in the 60-65 range in recent years, with a stable university level; its Douyin popularity ranking is 52nd, rated as 'relatively hot'; there are no significant negative events in reputation data, and the application psychological environment is stable; Hohai University has fewer advantageous disciplines in liberal arts, with main strengths in engineering fields such as Water Resources Engineering A+, Civil Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, and no A-class discipline support for liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is relatively hot, Accounting/Finance/Auditing is divided and wait-and-see, English/French and other foreign language majors are generally popular; the total number of Jiangxi Province college entrance examination takers in 2026 is approximately 474,900, with an estimated 207,056 History Category candidates based on historical proportions, an increase of about 1,001 compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition; in 2026; Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional appeal to Jiangxi candidates; the History Category enrollment scale is small (about 21 in 2026), with relatively concentrated competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2619, the forward-shifting pressure from the approximately 16% enrollment reduction in 2026, the slight increase in total Jiangxi candidates, and the divergence in liberal arts major popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will shift forward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2350, with a range of 1927-2773.
